# Scoped ignore list for the security-container-frontend CI job's scan
# ONLY (passed explicitly via trivy-action's `trivyignores` input on that
# one step) -- NOT a repo-root .trivyignore, so it can't accidentally
# suppress a real finding in the backend/backup image scans.
#
# CVE-2026-33630 is a use-after-free/double-free in c-ares's DNS
# query-completion handling, present in nginxinc/nginx-unprivileged's
# pinned 1-alpine3.23 base image (Alpine 3.23.5, c-ares 1.34.6-r0). As of
# 2026-07-10 the upstream nginx-unprivileged image has not yet published a
# rebuild with a patched c-ares (the 1-alpine3.23 tag still resolves to the
# exact digest already pinned in frontend/Dockerfile) -- there is no
# available fix to re-pin to yet.
#
# It is also unreachable in this deployment: this image only serves static
# built assets (frontend/nginx.conf has no `resolver` directive and no
# `proxy_pass`, i.e. no dynamic upstream hostname resolution at runtime),
# so the DNS-response-parsing code path c-ares's vulnerability requires is
# never exercised regardless. Re-check when nginxinc publishes a rebuilt
# 1-alpine3.23 (or 1-alpine) digest and re-pin frontend/Dockerfile then;
# remove this entry once that happens.
CVE-2026-33630

# CVE-2026-5773 (wrong file transfer via incorrect SMB connection reuse) and
# CVE-2026-6276 (cookie leak via connection reuse) are curl/libcurl
# vulnerabilities in the pinned 1-alpine3.23 base image (Alpine 3.23.5,
# curl/libcurl 8.19.0-r0; fixed upstream in 8.20.0-r0). Both bugs require
# curl/libcurl to actually make outbound HTTP(S) requests -- this image never
# does: it only serves static built assets via nginx (frontend/nginx.conf has
# no proxy_pass or other upstream call), and the container's own scripts
# (docker-entrypoint-runtime-config.sh, the HEALTHCHECK) use `wget` and
# `envsubst`, never `curl`. curl ships here only as a base-image OS package,
# unreachable in this deployment. Re-pin frontend/Dockerfile to a rebuilt
# 1-alpine3.23 digest carrying curl 8.20.0-r0+ once nginxinc publishes one,
# and remove these two entries then.
CVE-2026-5773
CVE-2026-6276
